title: 你的梦想是什么？
description_uz: «Nega o'qituvchi bo'lmoqchisan?» — Ikki do'st orzulari haqida suhbatlashadi: o'qituvchi va shifokor bo'lish, ota-onaning qo'llab-quvvatlashi, orzuni ro'yobga chiqarish va qahvaxona ochish. Bu dialog niyatlarni izohlash, sabab keltirish va bir-birini rag'batlantirishni mashq qiladi. Real maqsadlar haqida foydali so'zlar bilan to'la. Soya o'qish va rol o'ynash uchun ajoyib.
description_ru: «Почему ты хочешь стать учителем?» — Двое друзей говорят о мечтах: стать учителем и врачом, поддержка родителей, осуществление мечты и открытие кофейни. Диалог тренирует объяснение намерений, приведение причин и взаимную поддержку. Полон полезной лексики о реальных целях. Отлично подходит для затенения и ролевой игры.
description_en: «Why do you want to be a teacher?» — Two friends talk about their dreams: becoming a teacher and a doctor, parental support, making a dream come true, and opening a coffee shop. The dialogue practices explaining intentions, giving reasons, and encouraging each other. Full of useful vocabulary about real goals. Great for shadowing and role-play.

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ de mèngxiǎng shì dāng lǎoshī.
sentences.text_translation_en: My dream is to become a teacher.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: Why do you want to be a teacher?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Yīnwèi wǒ bàmā dōu shì lǎoshī.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Потому что мои родители оба учителя.
sentences.text_translation_en: Because both my parents are teachers.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 支持，他们也觉得当老师很好。
sentences.pinyin: Zhīchí, tāmen yě juéde dāng lǎoshī hěn hǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, ular ham o'qituvchi bo'lish yaxshi deb hisoblashadi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Поддерживают, они тоже считают, что быть учителем — это хорошо.
sentences.text_translation_en: They do — they also think being a teacher is great.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你小时候的梦想是什么？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ xiǎoshíhou de mèngxiǎng shì shénme?
sentences.text_translation_ru: О чём ты мечтал в детстве?
sentences.text_translation_en: What was your dream when you were little?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 小时候想当医生，后来改变了。
sentences.pinyin: Xiǎoshíhou xiǎng dāng yīshēng, hòulái gǎibiàn le.
sentences.text_translation: Bolaligimda shifokor bo'lishni xohlardim, keyin fikrim o'zgardi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: В детстве хотел стать врачом, потом передумал.
sentences.text_translation_en: When I was little I wanted to be a doctor, but later that changed.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ juéde mèngxiǎng néng shíxiàn ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you think dreams can come true?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 只要努力，一定可以实现。
sentences.text_translation: Faqat harakat qilsang, albatta ro'yobga chiqadi.
sentences.text_translation_en: As long as you work hard, it can definitely come true.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我的梦想是开一家咖啡店。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ de mèngxiǎng shì kāi yì jiā kāfēi diàn.
sentences.text_translation_en: My dream is to open a coffee shop.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Zhēn hǎo, wǒmen yìqǐ jiāyóu ba.
sentences.text_translation: Juda yaxshi, keling birga harakat qilaylik.
sentences.text_translation_en: That's great — let's work hard together.
sentences.speaker: B
